overview: CyberScan is an AI-powered cybersecurity web application that combines threat intelligence APIs with AI-based phishing detection. It provides URL scanning, IP reputation analysis, DNS/WHOIS lookup, and now uses Cloudmersive AI to analyze threats with confidence scores and categorical risk levels.
features: AI-based phishing detection with confidence scores (0-100%)
URL Scanner with VirusTotal, Google Safe Browsing + AI analysis
IP Scanner with AbuseIPDB + AI reputation analysis
DNS/WHOIS lookup with suspicious domain flagging
Scan history with AI results stored per user
PDF report export with AI analysis section
User authentication with OTP-based password reset
Live threat feed and attack timeline
